hooks.command: bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); TOOL_INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^\s*git\s+commit"; then bash "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/pre-commit.sh"; fi'

bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); TOOL_INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^\s*git\s+push"; then bash "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/pre-push.sh"; fi'

bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); USER_INPUT=$(cat); PLAN_REF=$(echo "$USER_INPUT" | grep -ioE "(plan|create plan|new plan)\s+[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+" | head -1 | sed "s/^[^ ]* //"); if [ -n "$PLAN_REF" ]; then bash "$ROOT/.claude/hooks/pre-plan.sh" "$PLAN_REF"; fi'

bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); LOG="$ROOT/.claude/hooks/hooks.log"; echo "[$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")] [stop] [INFO] Session stopping - running final checks" >> "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; ISSUES=0; if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo "[$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")] [stop] [WARN] Uncommitted changes remain in working tree" >> "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; echo "WARNING: Uncommitted changes remain. Review with git status."; ISSUES=1; fi; if find "$ROOT/.claude/plans" \( -name "*.ops.json" -o -name "ops-*.json" \) -print -quit 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then find "$ROOT/.claude/plans" \( -name "*.ops.json" -o -name "ops-*.json" \) 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r f; do if ! python3 -c "import json,sys; json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "[$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")] [stop] [WARN] Invalid ops.json: $f" >> "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; ISSUES=1; fi; done; fi; echo "[$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")] [stop] [INFO] Session ended (issues=$ISSUES)" >> "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; exit 0'
bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); LOG="$ROOT/.claude/hooks/hooks.log"; echo "[$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")] [subagent-stop] [INFO] Subagent completed" >> "$LOG" 2>/dev/null'

bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); LOG="$ROOT/.claude/hooks/hooks.log"; TOOL_INPUT=$(cat); TN=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json;\ntry: print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"tool_name\",\"unknown\"))\nexcept Exception: print(\"unknown\")" 2>/dev/null); TN=${TN:-unknown}; echo "[$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")] [tool-failure] [ERROR] Tool failed: $TN" >> "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; echo "[tool-failure] Tool $TN encountered an error. Check logs at $ROOT/.claude/hooks/hooks.log"'
